results.title: Node.js Tutorial for Beginners: Learn Node in 1 Hour
results.reason: Mosh is highly praised in comments for his structured approach, and the transcript shows a clear, high-level conceptual introduction to APIs and runtimes.
summary: Understand what Node is and how it works
Learn to use built-in tools for basic tasks
Manage and share code using the package manager
Build a simple web server from the ground up

results.title: Node.js Ultimate Beginner’s Guide in 7 Easy Steps
results.reason: Fireship provides an excellent fast-paced overview with high production value, though the transcript's mention of Deno and 2020 context is slightly dated.
summary: Learn the history and purpose of the platform
Install the software and run your first script
Understand how to handle files and data
Create a fast web application in seven steps

results.title: Node.js Crash Course
results.reason: Traversy Media is a gold standard for crash courses; the transcript confirms a comprehensive look at modules and fundamentals with strong viewer appreciation.
summary: Master the core modules for building applications
Work with the computer file system directly
Handle web requests and send back responses
Deploy a real project to a live server

results.title: Node JS Tutorial | Crash Course
results.reason: Telusko provides a very deep dive (88 mins) and the transcript shows a helpful comparison of Node vs other languages to provide context.
summary: Learn why this tool is popular for developers
Write code that runs outside a web browser
Connect different parts of your app together
Create a basic website using modern coding tricks

results.title: Node.js Crash Course for Beginners Tutorial - Learn Node Basics in 30 Minutes!
results.reason: A solid, concise 30-minute option that the transcript shows focuses heavily on the 'what is node' definition for absolute beginners.
summary: Quickly set up your coding environment for work
Learn to import and export code easily
Build a functional web server in minutes
Understand how to use external code libraries
